name: Pizza Bread Appetizers
recipeIngredient: 3 packages Frozen bread dough; 3, 1 lb loaves each
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the frozen bread dough.
2. Roll out each loaf of thawed dough into a rectangle.
3. Place an even layer of Swiss, Provolone, and Mozzarella cheeses on each rectangle, followed by pepperoni slices.
4. Roll up each rectangle tightly.
5. Make 4-5 slits in the top of each bread roll to allow steam to escape during baking.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Place the rolls in the oven and bake until golden brown, about 20-25 minutes.
8. Slice as you would regular bread.
NOTE: These appetizers can be made ahead of time, wrapped tightly in foil, and frozen. To serve, reheat in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) until warmed through.
